case_title: MARIA GARCIA VS. JOSEPHINE M. WEBER MD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARIA GARCIA WITH WITNESS JOSE GOMEZ AND COURT PROVIDED SPANISH INTERPRETER MURIEL FALAK. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSEPHINE WEBER. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROPER SERVICE OF PROCESS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEBER MD, JOSEPHINE M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
